_notes.default: No CORS, no CSP. SOP only.
_notes.mode1: CORS wildcard (*). All cross-origin fetch() allowed.
_notes.csp-balanced: CSP: scripts only from :3000 :4000 :6000. Port 5000 blocked.
_notes.mode-insecure: Balanced CSP, no SRI. CDN breach alert fires.
_notes.mode-sri-active: Balanced CSP + SRI hash on react-mock.js. CDN breach blocked.
_notes.cookie-naive: Lab 4 Task 1: No flags. JS-readable, sent everywhere.
_notes.cookie-httponly: Lab 4 Task 3: HttpOnly. JS blind to cookie.
_notes.cookie-path: Lab 4 Task 4: Path=/api. Cookie scoped to /api/* only.
_notes.cookie-secure: Lab 5 Task 1: HttpOnly only. Proxy can still steal it over HTTP.
_notes.cookie-secure-httponly: Lab 5 Task 2: HttpOnly + Secure. Browser won't send over plain HTTP.
